\"@openzeppelin/contracts/access/Ownable.sol\";\nimport \"@openzeppelin/contracts/token/ERC20/IERC20.sol\";\nimport \"@openzeppelin/contracts/token/ERC20/utils/SafeERC20.sol\";\nimport \"@openzeppelin/contracts/token/ERC721/ERC721.sol\";\nimport \"@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/ReentrancyGuard.sol\";\n\nimport \"./lib/PhoenixSig.sol\";\nimport \"./interface/IPhoenixNFT.sol\";\nimport \"./interface/IPhoenixDex.sol\";\nimport \"./PhoenixToken.sol\";\n\n/**\n * @dev Implementation of Phoenix Eggs - Soul-bound tokens owned by every possible ETH address (except address zero).\n *  - Cannot be Transferred, can only be Burned.\n *  - Requires 3 Valid Signatures to Burn NFT\n *  - Valid Signatures must come from existing Phoenix NFT holders (_burned[owner] == true)\n */\n/// @custom:security-contact info@charged.fi\ncontract PhoenixEggs is\n  Ownable,\n  PhoenixSig,\n  ERC721,\n  ReentrancyGuard\n{\n  using Strings for uint256;\n  using SafeERC20 for IERC20;\n  using Address for address payable;\n\n  error SoulBoundToken();\n\n  event PhoenixBurned(address indexed owner, uint256 newTokenId);\n  event PhxClaimed(address indexed owner, uint256 totalPhx);\n  event LiquidityCreated(address indexed caller, uint256 amountToken, uint256 amountUSDC, uint256 liquidity);\n\n  struct Signature {\n    uint8 v;\n    bytes32 r;\n    bytes32 s;\n  }\n\n  uint256 public constant _BASIS_POINTS = 10000;\n  uint256 public constant _POOL_USDC_BP = 7000;\n  uint256 public constant _RESERVE_USDC_BP = 500;\n  uint256 public constant _PHX_PER_BURN = 100;\n  uint256 public constant _PHX_PER_VOTE = 100;\n  uint256 public constant _PHX_PER_REFERRAL = 250;\n\n  IPhoenixNFT public _phoenixNft;\n  IPhoenixDex public _phoenixDex;\n  address public _phoenixToken;\n  address public _usdcToken;\n  address public _phoenixTreasury;\n\n  uint256 internal _maxNfts;\n  uint256 internal _maxTeamEggs;\n  uint256 internal _totalReferrals;\n  uint256 internal _totalTeamBurns;\n  uint256 internal _liquidityCreatedTimestamp;\n  uint256 internal _price;\n  string internal _baseUri;\n  mapping (address => bool) internal _burned;\n  mapping (address => uint256) internal _ownerPhxEarnings;\n\n  constructor()\n    Ownable(_msgSender())\n    PhoenixSig(\"PhoenixEggs\")\n    ERC721(\"Phoenix Egg\", \"PHXE\")\n  {\n    _price = 200 * 1e6; // Default to 200 USDC\n  }\n\n  /**\n    * @dev See {IERC721Metadata-name}.\n    */\n  function name() public pure override returns (string memory) {\n    return \"PhoenixEggs\";\n  }\n\n  /**\n    * @dev See {IERC721Metadata-symbol}.\n    */\n  function symbol() public pure override returns (string memory) {\n    return \"PHXE\";\n  }\n\n  /**\n    * @dev See {IERC721-balanceOf}.\n    */\n  function balanceOf(address owner) public view override returns (uint256) {\n    require(owner != address(0), \"invalid address\");\n    return _burned[owner] ? 0 : 1;\n  }\n\n  /**\n    * @dev See {IERC721-ownerOf}.\n    */\n  function ownerOf(uint256 tokenId) public view override returns (address) {\n    if (tokenId > 2**160) { return address(0); }\n    address owner = address(uint160(tokenId));\n    if (_burned[owner]) { return address(0); }\n    return owner;\n  }\n\n  function tokenOf(address owner) public view returns (uint256) {\n    if (_burned[owner]) { return 0; }\n    return uint256(uint160(owner));\n  }\n\n  function tokenURI(uint256 tokenId) public view override returns (string memory) {\n    if (tokenId > 2**160) { return \"\"; }\n    return string.concat(_baseUri, tokenId.toString());\n  }\n\n  function isMaxReached() public view returns (bool) {\n    return _maxNfts > 0 && _phoenixNft.totalSupply() == _maxNfts;\n  }\n\n  function isEggBurned(uint256 tokenId) external view returns (bool) {\n    address owner = address(uint160(tokenId));\n    return _burned[owner];\n  }\n\n  function getBurnPrice() external view returns (uint256) {\n    return _price;\n  }\n\n  function getNumBurnedEggs() external view returns (uint256) {\n    return _phoenixNft.totalSupply();\n  }\n\n  function getMaxNfts() external view returns (uint256) {\n    return _maxNfts;\n  }\n\n  function usdcBalance() external view returns (uint256) {\n    if (_usdcToken == address(0)) return 0;\n    return IERC20(_usdcToken).balanceOf(address(this));\n  }\n\n  function phxTokenAddress() external view returns (address) {\n    return _phoenixToken;\n  }\n\n  function usdcTokenAddress() external view returns (address) {\n    return _usdcToken;\n  }\n\n  function phoenixDexAddress() external view returns (address) {\n    return address(_phoenixDex);\n  }\n\n  function phxBalanceOf(address owner) external view returns (uint256) {\n    return _getOwnerTotalPHX(owner);\n  }\n\n  function phxTotalSupply() external view returns (uint256) {\n    return _getAccumulatedPHX();\n  }\n\n  function claimPhx() external {\n    _claimPhx(_msgSender());\n  }\n\n  function phxInitialPriceEstimate() external view returns (uint256) {\n    if (_usdcToken == address(0)) return 0;\n    uint256 totalUSDC = IERC20(_usdcToken).balanceOf(address(this));\n    uint256 poolUSDC = (totalUSDC * _POOL_USDC_BP) / _BASIS_POINTS;\n    uint256 accPHX = _getAccumulatedPHX();\n    return accPHX > 0 ? poolUSDC / accPHX : 0;\n  }\n\n  function getLiquidityCreationTimestamp() external view returns (uint256) {\n    return _liquidityCreatedTimestamp;\n  }\n\n  /**\n    * @dev Burn the Phoenix Egg to Release the Phoenix\n    */\n  function burn(\n    address referrer,\n    uint256 deadline,\n    Signature memory sig1,\n    Signature memory sig2,\n    Signature memory sig3\n  ) external nonReentrant {\n    address payable owner = payable(_msgSender());\n    uint256 tokenId = tokenOf(owner);\n\n    // Validate 3 Signatures\n    address signer1 = _validateSig(tokenId, deadline, sig1);\n    address signer2 = _validateSig(tokenId, deadline, sig2);\n    address signer3 = _validateSig(tokenId, deadline, sig3);\n    require(signer1 != signer2 && signer1 != signer3 && signer2 != signer3, \"duplicate signers\");\n\n    // Reward Owner\n    _ownerPhxEarnings[owner] += _PHX_PER_BURN;\n\n    // Reward Signers\n    _ownerPhxEarnings[signer1] += _PHX_PER_VOTE;\n    _ownerPhxEarnings[signer2] += _PHX_PER_VOTE;\n    _ownerPhxEarnings[signer3] += _PHX_PER_VOTE;\n\n    // Validate & Reward Referrer\n    bool hasReferrer = (referrer != address(0) && referrer != owner);\n    if (hasReferrer) {\n      _ownerPhxEarnings[referrer] += _PHX_PER_REFERRAL;\n      _totalReferrals += 1;\n    }\n\n    // Burn the Egg! Release the Magical Beast!\n    _burnEgg(owner, tokenId, false);\n  }\n\n  /**\n    * @dev Disable Approvals\n    */\n  function approve(address to, uint256 tokenId) public override {}\n  function getApproved(uint256 tokenId) public pure override returns (address) {}\n  function setApprovalForAll(address operator, bool approved) public override {}\n  function isApprovedForAll(address owner, address operator) public pure override returns (bool) {}\n\n  /**\n    * @dev Disable Transfers\n    */\n  function transferFrom(address from, address to, uint256 tokenId) public override {}\n  function safeTransferFrom(address from, address to, uint256 tokenId, bytes memory data) public override {}\n\n\n  /***********************************|\n  |            Only Owner             |\n  |__________________________________*/\n\n  /**\n    * @dev First Dozen Eggs is Team Pre-mint in order to Kick-Start Voting - Only Owner\n    */\n  function teamBurn(address payable owner) external onlyOwner {\n    require(address(_phoenixNft) != address(0), \"no phoenix\");\n    require(_phoenixNft.totalSupply() < _maxTeamEggs, \"team-burn ended\");\n\n    // Reward Owner\n    _ownerPhxEarnings[owner] += _PHX_PER_BURN;\n    _totalTeamBurns++;\n\n    // Burn the Egg!  Release the Magical Beast!\n    _burnEgg(owner, tokenOf(owner), true);\n  }\n\n  function createLiquidity() external onlyOwner {\n    _createLiquidity();\n  }\n\n  /**\n    * @dev Set Base URI for Metadata - Only Owner\n    */\n  function setBaseURI(string memory newBase) external onlyOwner {\n    _baseUri = newBase;\n  }\n\n  /**\n    * @dev Set the Minimum Price to Burn - Only Owner\n    */\n  function setPrice(uint256 newPrice) external onlyOwner {\n    _price = newPrice;\n  }\n\n  /**\n    * @dev Set the Max Amount of NFTs that can be Minted - Only Owner\n    */\n  function setMaxNfts(uint256 maxNfts) external onlyOwner {\n    require(address(_phoenixNft) != address(0), \"no phoenix\");\n    _maxNfts = maxNfts;\n  }\n\n  /**\n    * @dev Set the Max Amount of Team Eggs that can be Burned - Only Owner\n    */\n  function setMaxTeamEggs(uint256 maxTeamEggs) external onlyOwner {\n    _maxTeamEggs = maxTeamEggs;\n  }\n\n  /**\n    * @dev Set Phoenix NFT Contract - Only Owner\n    */\n  function setPhoenixNFT(address phoenixNft) external onlyOwner {\n    if (address(_phoenixNft) != address(0)) {\n      require(_phoenixNft.totalSupply() == 0, \"already started\");\n    }\n    _phoenixNft = IPhoenixNFT(phoenixNft);\n  }\n\n  /**\n    * @dev Set Phoenix Token Contract - Only Owner\n    */\n  function setPhoenixToken(address phoenixToken) external onlyOwner {\n    _phoenixToken = phoenixToken;\n  }\n\n  /**\n    * @dev Set USDC Token Contract - Only Owner\n    */\n  function setUsdcToken(address usdcToken) external onlyOwner {\n    _usdcToken = usdcToken;\n  }\n\n  /**\n    * @dev Set Phoenix DEX Contract - Only Owner\n    */\n  function setPhoenixDex(address phoenixDex) external onlyOwner {\n    _phoenixDex = IPhoenixDex(phoenixDex);\n  }\n\n  /**\n    * @dev Set Phoenix Treasury Contract - Only Owner\n    */\n  function setPhoenixTreasury(address treasury) external onlyOwner {\n    _phoenixTreasury = treasury;\n  }\n\n\n  /***********************************|\n  |        Private Functions          |\n  |__________________________________*/\n\n  function _getOwnerTotalPHX(address owner) internal view returns (uint256 totalPhx) {\n    totalPhx = _ownerPhxEarnings[owner] * 1e18;\n  }\n\n  function _getAccumulatedPHX() internal view returns (uint256 totalPhx) {\n    uint256 normalBurns = _phoenixNft.totalSupply() - _totalTeamBurns;\n    uint256 fromBurns = (_PHX_PER_BURN * _phoenixNft.totalSupply()) + (_PHX_PER_VOTE * 3 * normalBurns);\n    uint256 fromReferrals = _PHX_PER_REFERRAL * _totalReferrals;\n    totalPhx = (fromBurns + fromReferrals) * 1e18;\n  }\n\n  /**\n    * @dev Validates an Ethereum Signature\n    */\n  function _validateSig(uint256 tokenId, uint256 deadline, Signature memory sig) internal view returns (address) {\n    address signer = recoverSigner(tokenId, deadline, sig.v, sig.r, sig.s);\n    require(_phoenixNft.balanceOf(signer) > 0, \"Signer is not a Phoenix\");\n    return signer;\n  }\n\n  function _update(address to, uint256 tokenId, address auth) internal override returns (address) {\n    // Soul-bound: only burning (to == address(0)) is permitted\n    if (to != address(0)) {\n      revert SoulBoundToken();\n    }\n    return super._update(to, tokenId, auth);\n  }\n\n  /**\n    * @dev Burn the Phoenix Egg to Release the Phoenix\n    */\n  function _burnEgg(\n    address payable owner,\n    uint256 tokenId,\n    bool isTeamBurn\n  ) internal {\n    require(address(_phoenixNft) != address(0), \"no phoenix\");\n    require(!_burned[owner], \"already burned\");\n    require(_phoenixNft.totalSupply() != _maxNfts, \"end reached\");\n    require(_liquidityCreatedTimestamp == 0, \"liquidity event started\");\n    require(_usdcToken != address(0), \"no usdc\");\n\n    if (!isTeamBurn) {\n      IERC20(_usdcToken).safeTransferFrom(owner, address(this), _price);\n    }\n\n    // Spawn new Phoenix\n    _burned[owner] = true;\n    uint256 newTokenId = _phoenixNft.spawnFromAshes(owner, 0);\n\n    // Burn Events\n    emit Transfer(owner, address(0), tokenId);\n    emit PhoenixBurned(owner, newTokenId);\n  }\n\n  function _claimPhx(address owner) internal {\n    require(_liquidityCreatedTimestamp > 0, \"insufficient liquidity\");\n\n    uint256 totalPhx = _getOwnerTotalPHX(owner);\n    require(totalPhx > 0, \"no PHX to claim\");\n\n    // Clear Earnings for Owner\n    _ownerPhxEarnings[owner] = 0;\n\n    // Transfer PHX to Owner\n    IERC20(_phoenixToken).safeTransfer(owner, totalPhx);\n\n    // Emit Event\n    emit PhxClaimed(owner, totalPhx);\n  }\n\n  /**\n    * @dev Creates the DEX Liquidity Pair (USDC/PHX)\n    * Note: Can only be called after Max-NFTs are Burned or Expiry Time reached\n    */\n  function _createLiquidity() internal {\n    require(_phoenixTreasury != address(0), \"no treasury\");\n    require(address(_phoenixDex) != address(0), \"no dex\");\n    require(_usdcToken != address(0), \"no usdc\");\n    require(_liquidityCreatedTimestamp == 0, \"already created\");\n\n    // All USDC from NFT Minting\n    uint256 totalUSDC = IERC20(_usdcToken).balanceOf(address(this));\n\n    // Portion of Funds go to the Dex Pool\n    uint256 poolUSDC = (totalUSDC * _POOL_USDC_BP) / _BASIS_POINTS;\n\n    // Portion of Funds for Purchasing PHX Tokens to be Burned (stays in contract)\n    uint256 reserveUSDC = (totalUSDC * _RESERVE_USDC_BP) / _BASIS_POINTS;\n\n    // Portion of Funds for Team Treasury (sent to Treasury)\n    uint256 treasuryUSDC = totalUSDC - poolUSDC - reserveUSDC;\n\n    // Calculate Required PHX to Mint\n    uint256 accumulatedPHX = _getAccumulatedPHX();\n    uint256 totalSupply = (accumulatedPHX * 2);\n\n    // Mint PHX to this contract (half goes to Dex Pool, half remains claimable by NFT Holders)\n    PhoenixToken(_phoenixToken).mintAll(totalSupply);\n    require(PhoenixToken(_phoenixToken).balanceOf(address(this)) == totalSupply, \"mint failed\");\n\n    // Approve PhoenixDex to spend USDC and PHX\n    IERC20(_phoenixToken).approve(address(_phoenixDex), accumulatedPHX);\n    IERC20(_usdcToken).approve(address(_phoenixDex), poolUSDC);\n\n    // Create Liquidity using PhoenixDex\n    (uint256 amountToken, uint256 amountUSDC, uint256 liquidityTokens) = _phoenixDex.deployLiquidity(\n      _phoenixTreasury, // LP Tokens Receiver\n      accumulatedPHX,\n      poolUSDC\n    );\n\n    // Track Liquidity Event Time\n    _liquidityCreatedTimestamp = block.timestamp;\n\n    // Send Treasury USDC to Treasury\n    if (treasuryUSDC > 0) {\n      IERC20(_usdcToken).safeTransfer(_phoenixTreasury, treasuryUSDC);\n    }\n\n    // Emit Liquidity Event\n    emit LiquidityCreated(_msgSender(), amountToken, amountUSDC, liquidityTokens);\n  }\n}","keccak256":"0xe68ca36881a28722f62347fe738e5276c397699a613a0d88559290766b2e86f5","license":"MIT"},"contracts/PhoenixToken.sol":{"content":"// SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT\n\n// Only Owner\n    */\n  function setPhoenixEggs(address phoenixEggs) external onlyOwner {\n    _phoenixEggs = phoenixEggs;\n  }\n\n  modifier onlyPhoenixEggs() {\n    if (_msgSender() != _phoenixEggs) revert Unauthorized();\n    _;\n  }\n}\n","keccak256":"0x3ce6778b8ad7139f03f98f59d9c106cd56445990ba7f5e7916e6306fbca7e0a3","license":"MIT"},"contracts/interface/IPhoenixDex.sol":{"content":"// SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT\n\n// IPhoenixDex.sol\n// Copyright (c) 2025 CarbonOpus\n//\n// Permission is hereby granted, free of charge, to any person obtaining a copy\n// of this software and associated documentation files (the \"Software\"), to deal\n// in the Software without restriction, including without limitation the rights\n// to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute, sublicense, and/or sell\n// copies of the Software, and to permit persons to whom the Software is\n// furnished to do so, subject to the following conditions:\n//\n// The above copyright notice and this permission notice shall be included in all\n// copies or substantial portions of the Software.\n//\n// THE SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED \"AS IS\", WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR\n// IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO THE WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY,\n// FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE AND NON-INFRINGEMENT. IN NO EVENT SHALL THE\n// AUTHORS OR COPYRIGHT HOLDERS BE LIABLE FOR ANY CLAIM, DAMAGES OR OTHER\n// LIABILITY, WHETHER IN AN ACTION OF CONTRACT, TORT OR OTHERWISE, ARISING FROM,\n// OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THE SOFTWARE OR THE USE OR OTHER DEALINGS IN THE\n// SOFTWARE.\n\npragma solidity >=0.8.0;\n\nimport \"@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/cryptography/EIP712.sol\";\nimport \"@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/cryptography/ECDSA.sol\";\n\nimport \"../interface/IPhoenixSig.sol\";\n\nabstract contract PhoenixSig is IPhoenixSig, EIP712 {\n  bytes32 private constant _SIG_TYPEHASH =\n    keccak256(\"PhoenixSig(uint256 tokenId,uint256 deadline)\");\n\n  constructor(string memory name) EIP712(name, \"1\") {}\n\n  function recoverSigner(\n    uint256 tokenId,\n    uint256 deadline,\n    uint8 v,\n    bytes32 r,\n    bytes32 s\n  ) public virtual view override returns (address signer) {\n    require(block.timestamp <= deadline, \"PhoenixSig: expired deadline\");\n\n    bytes32 structHash = keccak256(abi.encode(_SIG_TYPEHASH, tokenId, deadline));\n    bytes32 hash = _hashTypedDataV4(structHash);\n    signer = ECDSA.recover(hash, v, r, s);\n  }\n\n  // solhint-disable-next-line func-name-mixedcase\n  function DOMAIN_SEPARATOR() external view override returns (bytes32) {\n    return _domainSeparatorV4();\n  }\n}\n","keccak256":"0x70b1ee4de648b136d97dc9a81883552ad03e867a1514bd07e319855e9d113c2a","license":"MIT"}},"version":1}

ECDSAInvalidSignatureLength(uint256).details: The signature has an invalid length.

ECDSAInvalidSignatureS(bytes32).details: The signature has an S value that is in the upper half order.

ERC721IncorrectOwner(address,uint256,add.details: Indicates an error related to the ownership over a particular token. Used in transfers.

params.owner: Address of the current owner of a token.
params.sender: Address whose tokens are being transferred.

ERC721InsufficientApproval(address,uint2.details: Indicates a failure with the `operator`’s approval. Used in transfers.

params.operator: Address that may be allowed to operate on tokens without being their owner.

ERC721InvalidApprover(address).details: Indicates a failure with the `approver` of a token to be approved. Used in approvals.

ERC721InvalidOperator(address).details: Indicates a failure with the `operator` to be approved. Used in approvals.

params.operator: Address that may be allowed to operate on tokens without being their owner.

ERC721InvalidOwner(address).details: Indicates that an address can't be an owner. For example, `address(0)` is a forbidden owner in ERC-20. Used in balance queries.

params.owner: Address of the current owner of a token.

ERC721InvalidReceiver(address).details: Indicates a failure with the token `receiver`. Used in transfers.

params.receiver: Address to which tokens are being transferred.

ERC721InvalidSender(address).details: Indicates a failure with the token `sender`. Used in transfers.

params.sender: Address whose tokens are being transferred.

ERC721NonexistentToken(uint256).details: Indicates a `tokenId` whose `owner` is the zero address.

OwnableInvalidOwner(address).details: The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)

OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address).details: The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation.

SafeERC20FailedOperation(address).details: An operation with an ERC-20 token failed.

Approval(address,address,uint256).details: Emitted when `owner` enables `approved` to manage the `tokenId` token.

ApprovalForAll(address,address,bool).details: Emitted when `owner` enables or disables (`approved`) `operator` to manage all of its assets.

EIP712DomainChanged().details: MAY be emitted to signal that the domain could have changed.

Transfer(address,address,uint256).details: Emitted when `tokenId` token is transferred from `from` to `to`.

burn(address,uint256,(uint8,bytes32,byte.details: Burn the Phoenix Egg to Release the Phoenix

eip712Domain().details: returns the fields and values that describe the domain separator used by this contract for EIP-712 signature.

getApproved(uint256).details: Returns the account approved for `tokenId` token. Requirements: - `tokenId` must exist.

isApprovedForAll(address,address).details: Returns if the `operator` is allowed to manage all of the assets of `owner`. See {setApprovalForAll}

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

safeTransferFrom(address,address,uint256.details: Safely transfers `tokenId` token from `from` to `to`, checking first that contract recipients are aware of the ERC-721 protocol to prevent tokens from being forever locked. Requirements: - `from` cannot be the zero address. - `to` cannot be the zero address. - `tokenId` token must exist and be owned by `from`. - If the caller is not `from`, it must have been allowed to move this token by either {approve} or   {setApprovalForAll}. - If `to` refers to a smart contract, it must implement {IERC721Receiver-onERC721Received}, which is called upon   a safe transfer. Emits a {Transfer} event.

Safely transfers `tokenId` token from `from` to `to`. Requirements: - `from` cannot be the zero address. - `to` cannot be the zero address. - `tokenId` token must exist and be owned by `from`. - If the caller is not `from`, it must be approved to move this token by either {approve} or {setApprovalForAll}. - If `to` refers to a smart contract, it must implement {IERC721Receiver-onERC721Received}, which is called upon   a safe transfer. Emits a {Transfer} event.

setApprovalForAll(address,bool).details: Approve or remove `operator` as an operator for the caller. Operators can call {transferFrom} or {safeTransferFrom} for any token owned by the caller. Requirements: - The `operator` cannot be the address zero. Emits an {ApprovalForAll} event.

setBaseURI(string).details: Set Base URI for Metadata - Only Owner

setMaxNfts(uint256).details: Set the Max Amount of NFTs that can be Minted - Only Owner

setMaxTeamEggs(uint256).details: Set the Max Amount of Team Eggs that can be Burned - Only Owner

setPhoenixDex(address).details: Set Phoenix DEX Contract - Only Owner

setPhoenixNFT(address).details: Set Phoenix NFT Contract - Only Owner

setPhoenixToken(address).details: Set Phoenix Token Contract - Only Owner

setPhoenixTreasury(address).details: Set Phoenix Treasury Contract - Only Owner

setPrice(uint256).details: Set the Minimum Price to Burn - Only Owner

setUsdcToken(address).details: Set USDC Token Contract - Only Owner

supportsInterface(bytes4).details: Returns true if this contract implements the interface defined by `interfaceId`. See the corresponding https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-165#how-interfaces-are-identified[ERC section] to learn more about how these ids are created. This function call must use less than 30 000 gas.

teamBurn(address).details: First Dozen Eggs is Team Pre-mint in order to Kick-Start Voting - Only Owner

tokenURI(uint256).details: Returns the Uniform Resource Identifier (URI) for `tokenId` token.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.
